title: Everlast Modpack
description: The perfect combination of performance, vanilla+ and QoL mods.
body:
This modpack improves game performance, let you customize your client appearance and adds a lot of QoL features. **Everlast Modpack** aims to build the perfect Vanilla+ experience so won't see any crazy mod that adds a lot of new content to the game here. Hope you like it :)

- Performance: boost your FPS, minimize lag spikes, reduce CPU and RAM usage, improve stability and connectivity (both local and online), load game and worlds faster, many bugfixes etc. In a few words: makes the game run better.

- Quality of Life: add extra info to your HUD (coordinates, time, equipment durability), camera zoom, inventory sorter, dynamic lights, food items info, etc.

- Customization: menus, chat, F3 screen and more.


This modpack is client-side only and can be used in singleplayer and many vanilla servers (check specific server rules first!).


Mods included:
- 3D Skin Layers
- Advancement Plaques
- AmbientSounds
- Appleskin
- Architectury API
- AutoHUD
- Bad Packets
- Beenfo
- Better Advancements
- Better F3
- Better Ping Display
- Better Statistics Screen
- Better Third Person
- Bobby
- Borderless Mining
- Camera Utils
- Chat Heads
